<!--
Thanks for contributing to Arc MCP Builder Assistant.
Keep changes small and focused. The repo is an early independent builder
resource — most PRs are documentation, prompt, validator/CI, or static
site improvements.
-->

## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation update (`docs/`, `README.md`, etc.)
- [ ] Prompt library update (`prompts/`)
- [ ] Static site / `index.html` change
- [ ] Demo mockup update (`examples/`)
- [ ] Validator or CI change
- [ ] Community health file (CoC, templates, etc.)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/Anstrays/arc-mcp-builder-assistant/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed its expectations.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, wallet seed phrases, or production credentials are included.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/test_all.py` passes locally.
- [ ] Documentation/README is updated if the change affects user-visible behavior.
- [ ] External links use `rel="noopener noreferrer"` when `target="_blank"`.
- [ ] Claims about Arc behavior are sourced from `https://docs.arc.network/` or marked as unverified.

## Additional context

<!-- Issue links, screenshots, deploy preview URLs, or any other useful context. -->
